expectations.text: Identifies that #8201 is closed but its parent PRD task-graph line is still unchecked.
Checks or updates the parent PRD task-graph line for #8201 from `[ ]` to `[x]` before starting W2.
expectations.evidence: PRD execution status for #8200  Completed this run:  1. #8201 Add webhook retry headers - closed child issue is out of sync with the parent task graph; sync parent checkbo

expectations.text: Makes clear that only the checkbox should change and the rest of the managed task-graph line stays the same.
expectations.evidence: Notes:  - The parent task-graph line for #8201 is still `[ ]`; update only the leading checkbox to `[x]` and leave the rest of the line unchanged before proceeding. - After that synchronization, W2/#8202 is ready to proceed.   User prompt: Resume /prd-imp

expectations.text: Only after the parent checkbox is synchronized does it treat W2 or #8202 as ready to proceed.
expectations.evidence: nc parent checkbox for #8201 before starting the next wave.  Blocked / waiting:  1. None  Next ready work:  - W2: #8202 Emit webhook retry metrics  Notes:  - The parent task-graph line for #8201 is still `[ ]`; update only

uncertainties: Closed child #8201 was found unchecked in the parent task graph. The controller should synchronize only the checkbox on that exact managed line to `[x]` before treating W2/#8202 as ready.
